memory_entries.text: In jd/tenacity, core retry classes are in tenacity/__init__.py. RetryError holds last_attempt, a tenacity.Future subclass of concurrent.futures.Future. Multiprocessing issue was caused by RetryError pickling a real Future whose inherited condition contains an unpickleable _thread.RLock. Tests include tests/test_tenacity.py with TestRetryException and TestPickle around lines ~1927 and ~2013.
